heading: Coast Guard anchorages
label: 635 Coast Guard anchorages
text: The Secretary may perform dredging at Federal expense within and adjacent to anchorages established by the Coast Guard pursuant to existing authorities.
notes: “Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Army, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of div. AA of Pub. L. 116–260section 2201 of this title
